title: Delicate Andalusian Custard Tarts
description: A classic Spanish dessert featuring delicate pastry, rich custard, and a touch of sweetness. Perfect for warm weather or special occasions.
instructions: Roll out pastry and cut into circles for tarts.
Brush pastry with olive oil and place in tart pans.
Bake pastry for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and custard.
Pour custard mixture into baked pastry shells.
Bake for an additional 10-12 minutes or until custard is set.
Allow tarts to cool completely before serving.
